title: KS Better Torchflower
description: Make the torchflower emit light like it should be !
body:
Make the torchflower glow in the dark !
![better torchflower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ece6e3dd387bf432680abc9cccbc5ae38cb052e.png)


developer's note:
This datapack use an advancement to detect when a player place a torchflower, then execute a raycast function to find the torchflower, summon a marker on the torchflower an place a light block on top of the torchflower, if the block above the torchflower is not air, the torchflower won't emit any light. A ticking function is used to check if the torchflower is removed, it runs every 5 ticks and once for every torchflower, and it runs only when there is at least one torchflower placed in the world, that way if you pc can run minecraft, it can run this datapack with no issue !


If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !
